events.title: ABUELA LUNA — Full Moon Cacao Ceremony with Raio
events.description: Raio — Rob Weber — has been holding the ABUELA LUNA ceremony at The Yoga Barn for years: a full moon cacao ritual that has become one of the steadiest anchors in Ubud's conscious-ceremony calendar. The July edition lands on the full moon itself (July 29), the way it always does — the name Abuela Luna is not decoration, the timing is the point. His ensemble brings live medicine music into the ceremony: Carlos Romero, Ryan Narayan, Rob Recker, and Sky on guitar weave an arc that carries the cacao opening through to integration close. Format: ceremonial welcome → organic cacao → live medicine-music journey → integration. Ceremony runs 19:30–21:15. IDR 350,000. Tickets via Megatix.
events.short_description: Raio's monthly ABUELA LUNA lands on the full moon itself — Jul 29 at Yoga Barn. Ceremonial cacao + live medicine music with Carlos Romero, Ryan Narayan, Rob Recker & Sky.
events.venue_address: Jl. Hanoman, Padangtegal, Ubud, Gianyar, Bali 80571
